productName: Lish Organics - Full Melt Bubble Hash - DOH Tested - Purple Trainwreck - 1g
description: Hand-crafted hybrid hash from Purple Trainwreck, the timeless concentrate — sifted trichomes pressed into a mellow, flavorful, full-spectrum classic. Rich and traditional, with notes of grape, lavender, and sweet, leading into an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
